name: SA Legal — Client Onboarding
description: South African legal compliance checklist for client onboarding, covering FICA/KYC, engagement formalities, and risk assessment

items.name: Proof of Identity
items.description: SA ID document or passport — certified copy required per FICA regulations.
items.requiredDocumentLabel: Certified copy of SA ID / passport

items.name: Proof of Address
items.description: Proof of residential or business address, not older than 3 months (utility bill, bank statement, or municipal account).
items.requiredDocumentLabel: Proof of address (not older than 3 months)

items.name: Company Registration Docs
items.description: CIPC registration certificate for company, CC, or trust clients.

items.name: Trust Deed
items.description: Certified copy of the trust deed for trust clients, including any amendments.

items.name: Beneficial Ownership Declaration
items.description: Declaration of beneficial ownership per PCC Rule 59 requirements — identify all persons with 25% or more ownership or control.

items.name: Source of Funds Declaration
items.description: Declaration of the origin and source of funds for the transaction, as required by FICA.

items.name: Engagement Letter Signed
items.description: Engagement letter signed by the client, confirming mandate and fee arrangement.

items.name: Conflict Check Performed
items.description: Documented conflict of interest check completed and cleared before accepting the mandate.

items.name: Power of Attorney Signed
items.description: Power of attorney signed by the client, if applicable to the matter type (e.g., litigation).

items.name: FICA Risk Assessment
items.description: Client risk rating assessment (low/medium/high) based on FICA risk matrix and client profile.

items.name: Sanctions Screening
items.description: Client screened against South African and international sanctions lists (UN, EU, OFAC).
